title: Is there a way to delete all the files all at once in File Gallery?
excerpt: When we duplicated a board, we need to delete files one-by-one in each items, is there a way to delete all at once?

posts.author: Yiqi (Yiqi Wang)
posts.cookedHtml: When we duplicated a board, we need to delete files one-by-one in each items, is there a way to delete all at once?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Do they live only in the files gallery or also in a files column?

posts.author: Yiqi (Yiqi Wang)
posts.cookedHtml: They are live in both files gallery and files column. We have automation set up to clear files column, but when we run that automation, it only remove the files from files column but not from files gallery.
